notes: Re-review of v193 after fix commit f555d7c. All 4 previously identified issues are confirmed resolved: (1) MEDIUM-1: hardcoded rgba in MetricsAreaChart grid lines replaced with CSS vars --color-grid-line and --color-grid-line-subtle in both dark and light themes.
